bullets: Dozens of Protestant, Catholic, and house church Christians in China detained without release for worship, devotional app development, conducting weddings, children's faith instruction, and refusing state surveillance controls.

More than two dozen Jehovah's Witnesses in Eritrea, including minors, held for months or years without charge for peaceful private worship, conscientious objection, and refusing to fund political movements.
A 13-year-old Christian girl in Pakistan trapped in a forced marriage validated by forged documents, with her family denied justice by the courts.
Naga and Kuki Christian communities in India grieving the mutilation and killing of tribal believers, including pastors, amid escalating ethnic violence.
Civilians across Lebanon, including patients, families, and displaced residents, amid ongoing airstrikes on hospitals, cities, and agricultural areas causing thousands of casualties
Palestinians in Gaza facing continued strikes, ceasefire violations, destroyed healthcare facilities, and severe humanitarian conditions affecting children and families
Iranian civilians and military families amid extensive US and Israeli strikes on dozens of military bases, ports, and infrastructure across the country
Residents of Bahrain, Jordan, and Kuwait caught in cross-border missile and drone exchanges, including children injured by falling debris
Sailors and maritime workers in the Gulf of Oman and surrounding waters killed or endangered amid strikes on commercial tankers and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz
Civilians in Sudan, including mourners struck at a funeral and residents navigating ongoing drone attacks on urban areas in a two-year civil war
Nigerian communities facing mass kidnappings, school attacks, military ambushes, and armed group violence across multiple regions of the country
Kenyan border communities and security personnel under repeated al-Shabaab attacks, and civilians killed in protest clashes over a proposed quarantine facility
Civilians in Myanmar living under military airstrikes, including attacks on religious sites used as community shelters
Syrians in Damascus and across the country amid sudden collapse of central authority and deep uncertainty about security and basic services
Afghan civilians killed by cross-border airstrikes and communities living under ongoing armed threats from multiple directions
Malian civilians amid escalating jihadist attacks including the killing of senior military leadership and ongoing armed group activity
Somali communities in contested regions caught between government military operations and entrenched armed group presence
South African residents in informal settlements targeted in coordinated deadly shootings, and African migrants fleeing xenophobic violence
Families of soldiers and military personnel killed in a helicopter crash in Pakistan-administered Kashmir and ongoing armed attacks in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
Iraqi communities in rural areas facing persistent armed group activity and ongoing military strikes
Ethnic minority families in Northern Ireland sheltering from racially motivated riots, arson, and displacement
Families missing loved ones and civilians caught in cartel and gang violence across Mexico
Ultra-Orthodox and secular communities in Israel amid recurring violent unrest over military conscription policies
Uyghur families in China and abroad amid a decade-long wait for justice following a deadly bombing, and concerns about fair trial standards
Congolese civilians and civic communities facing democratic backsliding and political crisis ahead of upcoming elections
American and other foreign nationals detained in Myanmar with limited access to legal or consular support

Thousands of families across the Philippines facing death, displacement, and destruction after a catastrophic earthquake, tsunami, and landslide series left at least 37 dead and tens of thousands homeless.
Over 835 families and communities across Pakistan grieving mass casualties and displacement as devastating monsoon flooding continues to claim lives and destroy homes.
More than 700,000 evacuated Cuban residents displaced and facing uncertainty as Hurricane Melissa strikes their island amid existing economic hardship.

Communities in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda amid a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak with over 550 cases, more than 100 deaths, no approved treatment for the Bundibugyo strain, and armed conflict blocking medical response.
Sixty-two thousand displaced Somali families who have fled drought conditions and are now dependent on humanitarian aid for survival.
Thirty-seven people killed and communities in southern Brazil mourning losses and seeking shelter after deadly rains and mudslides.
Families across Madagascar grieving 20 deaths and 33 injuries as Cyclone Gezani strikes an island already battered by repeated storms this season.
Fifteen people killed in China after a mudslide buried a rural guesthouse during heavy rainfall, with families grieving sudden loss.
Residents of northern Illinois and northwest Indiana facing damage and disruption after a tornado outbreak moved through their communities.
Thousands of Australians evacuated from south and south-west Sydney neighborhoods as floodwaters rise and threaten homes.
Communities in Cuba still facing the aftermath of Hurricane Melissa as more than 700,000 displaced residents await news of damage to homes and livelihoods.
Residents of Canada displaced by wildfires in Saskatchewan and flash flooding in Manitoba as multiple simultaneous disasters strain emergency response.
Eight people killed and others still missing in the Central African Republic following a deadly landslide with rescue efforts still underway.
Families in northeastern India mourning multiple deaths from repeated landslides and road accidents across mountainous terrain during monsoon season.
Three people killed in northern Vietnam and families grieving after a sudden landslide with little warning in a high-risk mountainous region.
A family of four in Sri Lanka buried and killed by a landslide, with communities mourning their loss and facing ongoing risk.
Three people killed in Kenya amid violent unrest surrounding a proposed disease quarantine facility, including a teenager caught in the chaos.
Residents across the United Kingdom facing worsening drought conditions and potential water restrictions as reserves fall to critical levels.
Communities in Uganda affected by a Bundibugyo virus disease outbreak with limited treatment options available.
Residents of central Canada facing a meningococcal disease outbreak with authorities urging vigilance and preventive action.
Communities near an active volcano in Indonesia living under ongoing eruption activity and earthquake swarms creating fear and daily disruption.
Earthquake-affected residents across Chile, Costa Rica, Russia, Vanuatu, Timor-Leste, and New Zealand in seismically active regions monitoring for damage and aftershocks.
Japan facing damage to a centuries-old UNESCO heritage landmark and surrounding communities after Typhoon Jangmi made landfall.
Families in Texas, Indiana, and North Carolina affected by flooding, flash floods, and storm damage as severe weather moves across multiple US states.
Displaced families along the Euphrates River in Syria, already living in fragile post-conflict conditions, now facing additional humanitarian hardship from flooding.
